brand.$description: Tier 2 brand identity — Semble (demo sub-brand). ADDITIVE over Corilus. Semble's palette: Shamrock #38D2A6 (primary), Yellow Orange #FFB03D (accent), black/white. Per the brand-exact decision, primary is a CONCRETE off-ramp colour (the exact Shamrock swatch) and fills carry DARK text (neutral.on-light) → WCAG AA (~9.3:1) with an exact brand match. Does NOT touch the shared mint/amber ramps. Everything not listed inherits Corilus.

primary.$description: Semble Shamrock #38D2A6 — exact brand colour (off-ramp). Action accent + active states.

primary-deep.$description: Solid action fill = the exact Shamrock; carries DARK text at AA.

secondary.$description: White — Semble inverts to white on dark / ambient surfaces (matches the white glyph in its logo).

neutral.$description: Brand-exact fills use DARK text. on-light overrides Corilus's white so text/icons on the Shamrock fill meet WCAG AA.

on-light.$description: Near-black text/icon on the Shamrock fill (~9.3:1).

fill.$description: Surface scale tinted toward the Semble shamrock hue (sage, hue 169) — overrides Corilus's cool slate so panels/cards/borders/body carry a faint green cast. Same lightness/chroma as slate; only the hue differs.

logo.$description: FALLBACK only. Semble's real mark is a bundled SVG asset (src/lib/logo.js → BRAND_LOGOS.semble): a solid Shamrock tile with a white glyph, used verbatim — it does NOT read these vars.

accent.$description: Semble Yellow Orange #FFB03D (hue 72) — exact off-ramp brand accent for inverted surfaces + ambient. 700/950 are darker steps of the same hue.

tint.$description: Selected-state overlay at the Shamrock hue (169). Concrete OKLCH-with-alpha, shared tint weight (L/C 0.5792/0.1048); composites over any surface. Hex fallback #248e6f.

radius.$description: Semble corner character — DELIBERATELY HARSH (demo): square/near-square corners. Drives --density-radius to 0 → the whole UI sharpens cohesively; only --krnl-radius-pill stays round.

font.$description: Semble uses DM Sans (bundled as a base64 variable ttf via build/gen-fonts.mjs).
